# Comprehensive Geriatric Assessment CDS (smart-geri-cds)

## Overview
Open-source Comprehensive Geriatric Assessment (CGA) clinical decision support tool running entirely in the browser via the SMART on FHIR standard. Deployed on GitHub Pages with zero backend; PWA offline-capable. Stratified by the Clinical Frailty Scale (CFS 1–9).

## Features
- Two paths: public self-check (/self-check/) and professional assessment (/assess/ → /result/ → /workspace/)
- CFS-stratified, three-tier CGA scoring; severity = normal / monitor / refer / incomplete
- SMART on FHIR upload: connected hospital (fhirclient) + redirect-type intake institutions (e.g. GCM), shared /launch/ callback
- Education content system (article + video) with full-text search
- Client-side PDF report generation

## Technical
- Astro 5 SSG + Svelte 5 islands (runes)
- IndexedDB (Dexie.js) for client-side storage
- fhirclient.js + native Web Crypto PKCE
- Pagefind in-browser search; jsPDF reports

## URL
https://smart-geri-cds.yao.care/

## Source
https://github.com/yao-care/smart-geri-cds
